name: Clipboard Collection of Image Data with Xclip Tool
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Clipboard Collection of Image Data with Xclip Tool
SIGMA Description: Detects attempts to collect image data stored in the clipboard from users with the usage of xclip tool.
Xclip has to be installed.
Highly recommended using rule on servers, due to high usage of clipboard utilities on user workstations.


False positives:
- Legitimate usage of xclip tools

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%xclip%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-selection%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%-sel%') AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%clipboard%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%clip%') AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%-t%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a4%image/%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a5%-o%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Clipboard Collection of Image Data with Xclip Tool on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%xclip%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-selection%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%-sel%') AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%clipboard%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%clip%') AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%-t%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a4%image/%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a5%-o%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Clipboard Collection of Image Data with Xclip Tool
